case_title: THE ADWORKS FOR S.F VS SAN FRANCISCO CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CLEANERS
